title: Cosmic's Creatified Elytra
description: Reskin your Elytra to better match with the Create Mod Aesthetic!
body: This resource pack retextures the Elytra to better fit with Create Mod's Aesthetics by replacing your elytra wings texture with a texture based on Create Mod's windmill sails. This resource pack should be compatible with any modpack that does not remove the vanilla Elytra textures, but I have not tested it with mods like elytra trims or other similar mods. Feel free to include this resource pack in any modpacks, all I ask is to be credited.
